countryLabel: Language of the country of the employment relationship
sessionSavePrompt: Enter a name to save this session:
sessionLoadNoSelection: Select a saved session before loading.
sessionLoadNotFound: The selected session could not be loaded.
sessionImportError: The JSON file could not be read. Make sure it is a session exported from NoEstásSol@.
sessionImportSuccess: Session loaded from the JSON file.
sessionNoWizard: The form could not be accessed to save or load the session.
wizardTitle: Guided draft to leave a record
wizardSubtitle: If the “structure” of your organisation has holes that everyone sees and nobody names, taking a breath and organising the facts is already progress. Answer a few questions and get a clear, exportable draft to submit (or keep) before the competent labour authority in the selected country. If you are a company or HR team, use it as a mirror: detecting and correcting the issue in time prevents it from escalating.
step1Intro: The labour authority needs to identify the person submitting the document. You may request that your identity not be disclosed to the company.
roleOtherLabel: Describe your relationship with the company
roleOtherPlaceholder: For example: family member, support professional, etc.
step2Intro: The more information you provide about the company, the easier it will be to identify it.
companyIdLabel: Company tax ID (if you know it)
companyAddressPlaceholder: Address of the workplace where you work
employmentEndHelp: Leave blank if you still work for the company.
inspectionProvinceLabel: Province where you will file the complaint
step3Intro: Select the type of situation and describe in detail what is happening.
issueNoContract: Work without contract / social security registration
factsStartLabel: Since when it has been happening
workSchedulePlaceholder: Example: 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday from 9:00 to 17:00...
factsDescriptionPlaceholder: Explain what happens, how, with whom, on which dates, shifts, etc.
factsDescriptionHelp: Try to be specific but clear: indicate approximate dates, people involved and consequences.
factsEntriesHelp: Add one line for each relevant fact, indicating date, place, shift, what happened, how it unfolded and who witnessed it.
evidencePlaceholder: Payslips, messages, emails, recordings, medical reports...
evidenceHelp: Do not attach the documents here, just describe them so they can be mentioned in the document.
evidenceHelpInline: Describe each piece of evidence indicating the type, the file title and a brief summary of its contents. Do not attach the documents here; they are only mentioned in the complaint.
evidenceTypePlaceholder: Type of evidence (video, audio, image, document...)
evidenceTitlePlaceholder: Title or description of the file
evidenceSummaryPlaceholder: Summary of the most relevant content
witnessesPlaceholder: Names, positions or relationship with the company, if known.
witnessesHelpInline: Add one line for each person who may testify about the facts, indicating their name, role or relationship with the company and any relevant information (for example, whether they may be an accomplice of the harasser).
witnessRolePlaceholder: Role or relationship with the company
requestAnonymityLabel: I request that my identity not be disclosed to the reported company.
additionalRequestsPlaceholder: For example: that a specific workplace be inspected, that certain documentation be reviewed, etc.
additionalRequestsHelpInline: If you wish, add specific requests (for example, that a specific workplace be inspected or that certain documentation be reviewed).
step4Intro: Review that the information is correct. Then you can export the document as PDF and decide whether to submit it to the competent labour authority in the selected country.
confirmAccuracyLabel: I declare that the information I provide is true to the best of my knowledge and belief.
legalDisclaimer: This tool is for guidance only and does not replace professional legal advice. Always review the final document and, if in doubt, consult a union, labour adviser or employment lawyer.
helperText: Your data does not leave this device. Here you only organise information and generate an exportable draft.
validationRequired: Please complete the required fields marked before continuing.
validationConfirmAccuracy: You must confirm that the information is true before generating the document.
pdfErrorNoLib: The PDF generator could not be initialised. Check your connection or try again.
pdfErrorBuildText: The complaint text could not be prepared. Please try again.
letterHeaderEs: To the Labour and Social Security Inspectorate
letterAuthorityEs: the Labour and Social Security Inspectorate
letterHeaderIt: To the competent labour authority in Italy (Ispettorato Nazionale del Lavoro)
letterAuthorityIt: the competent labour authority in Italy (Ispettorato Nazionale del Lavoro)
letterHeaderFr: To the competent labour authority in France (Inspection du travail)
letterAuthorityFr: the competent labour authority in France (Inspection du travail)
letterHeaderDe: To the competent labour authority in Germany (Arbeitsschutzbehörde)
letterAuthorityDe: the competent labour authority in Germany (Arbeitsschutzbehörde)
letterHeaderPt: To the competent labour authority in Portugal (Autoridade para as Condições do Trabalho)
letterAuthorityPt: the competent labour authority in Portugal (Autoridade para as Condições do Trabalho)
letterHeaderBr: To the competent labour authority in Brazil (Ministério do Trabalho / Superintendência Regional do Trabalho)
letterAuthorityBr: the competent labour authority in Brazil (Ministério do Trabalho / Superintendência Regional do Trabalho)
letterRoleWorkerClause: worker of the company indicated below
letterRoleExWorkerClause: former worker of the company indicated below
letterRoleUnionRepClause: representative of the workers in the company indicated below
letterRoleOtherClauseFallback: person interested in the facts described
letterCompanyIntro: That I provide or have provided labour services for the company
letterCompanyAddressIntro: with registered address or workplace at
letterCompanyJobFunctionsIntro: performing the duties of the position of
letterCompanyScheduleIntro: with an approximate schedule and working time of:
letterEmploymentDefault: the employment relationship being in force
letterEmploymentStartPrefix: the employment relationship having started on
letterIssueNoContract: Provision of services without a written contract and/or without Social Security registration.
letterIssueUnpaidHours: Performance of overtime that is neither paid nor compensated with rest.
letterIssueWages: Delays or non-payment of wages and/or remuneration below what is established in the collective agreement or contract.
letterIssueSafety: Breaches of occupational risk prevention, safety and health at work.
letterIssueHarassment: Situations of workplace harassment and/or sexual harassment in the workplace.
letterIssueDiscrimination: Situations of discrimination on grounds of sex, origin, age, sexual orientation, disability or other causes.
letterIssueOther: Other possible breaches of labour or Social Security regulations.
letterIrregularitiesIntro: That, within the framework of this employment relationship, the following irregularities have been taking place:
letterIrregularitiesIntro2: That, within the framework of this employment relationship, irregularities have been occurring such as
letterIrregularitiesDetailIntro: In particular, I set out the facts in more detail below:
letterFactsEntriesIntro: For a more precise record, I set out below some of the most relevant facts:
letterFactsEntriesGenericIntro: In relation to the facts described
letterFactEntryWitnessIntro: With the following persons present or acting as witnesses
letterFactsPeriodIntro: The facts described have taken place
letterFactsOngoingSuffix: and continue to occur at present
letterEvidenceIntro: As evidence and supporting documentation of the facts, I state that I have:
letterEvidenceIntro2: Regarding the documentation and means of evidence available to me, I highlight the following:
letterEvidenceEntryTypePrefix: A piece of evidence of type
letterEvidenceEntryTypeGeneric: A documentary piece of evidence relating to
letterEvidenceEntrySummaryPrefix: Its main content is as follows
letterEvidenceClosing: All this evidence will be made available to the Inspectorate when required.
letterWitnessesIntro: Likewise, I indicate as possible witnesses of the facts:
letterWitnessesIntro2: Likewise, I indicate the following persons as possible witnesses of the facts:
letterWitnessEntryGenericName: a person linked to the reported company
letterWitnessEntryRolePrefix: who holds the position or performs the role of
letterWitnessEntryInfoPrefix: with regard to whom I note that
letterRequestBody: That {authority} acknowledge receipt of this document, investigate the facts described and, where appropriate, adopt the pertinent legal measures.
letterAnonymityRequest: Likewise, I expressly request that my identity not be disclosed to the company mentioned, in accordance with the applicable regulations.
letterAdditionalRequestsIntro2: Additionally, I make the following specific requests:
letterAdditionalRequestTitlePrefix: That special attention be paid to the request relating to
letterAdditionalRequestGenericTitle: That the additional request I make be addressed
letterAdditionalRequestsTextIntro: Likewise, I place the following on record:
licenseCheckingBody: One moment, we are verifying your NoEstásSol@ licence.
licenseNeedsOnlineBody: To activate NoEstásSol@ for the first time you need an Internet connection. Open the app again when you are online.
licenseNoSessionTitle: Sign in to activate the app
licenseNoSessionBody: Open your OptimeFlow(s) account on the main website to sign in and activate your NoEstásSol@ licence.
licenseNoLicenseBody: Your account does not have an active NoEstásSol@ licence. Buy the app in the OptimeFlow(s) store and open it again.
licenseErrorTitle: The licence could not be checked
licenseErrorBody: There was a problem checking the licence. Check your connection and try again.
licenseConfigErrorBody: The app cannot connect to Supabase. Check the project configuration or contact the developer.

privacyPanelBodyHtml:
This application works entirely on your device: the data you enter is not sent to any server.

  • No user account is created.
  • The texts you write are used only to generate the draft document in your browser.
  • Only the language, selected country and interface theme are stored in the browser for your convenience.

If you clear your browser data, these preferences will also be removed.
